# Template: .editorconfig

## Generation Logic

Select indent style/size based on primary technology from Technology Stack.

## Template

```ini
# {System Name} — Editor Configuration
# Generated by AI-DWG | Stack: {primary-technology}
# https://editorconfig.org

root = true

[*]
charset = utf-8
end_of_line = {lf | crlf — based on tech}
indent_style = {space | tab — based on tech}
indent_size = {2 | 4 — based on tech}
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

[*.{primary-extensions}]
indent_size = {tech-specific}

[*.{yml,yaml}]
indent_size = 2

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

[Makefile]
indent_style = tab
```

## Technology → Config Mapping

| Technology | EOL | Style | Size |
|-----------|:---:|:-----:|:----:|
| TypeScript/JS | lf | space | 2 |
| Python | lf | space | 4 |
| C#/.NET | crlf | space | 4 |
| Java | lf | space | 4 |
| Go | lf | tab | 4 |
